judge_result.short_rationale: It includes the first action of moving to fresh air/away from contamination, but drops the required instruction to keep the person resting. It also adds unsupported and wrong-incident advice: rinsing mouth/nose with water, telling them to breathe deeply, and a vomiting warning that belongs to ingestion, not inhalation. Escalation is narrowed to specific symptoms instead of the source condition of symptoms developing or persisting.
